scopeNote: Re-ran the configured milestone validators after the prior scrutiny failures. The scoped test suite, compile/typecheck, and Spotless lint check all passed on the repaired branch; both previously failing features now pass focused re-review, and the scrutiny worker applied low-risk shared-state updates for the proven RLS/runtime contracts.

appliedUpdates.description: Added the `accounting-rls-proof` command so accounting-table RLS rechecks can use a canonical manifest entry instead of an ad hoc Maven invocation.

Documented the canonical runtime contract for accounting RLS: `CompanyContextHolder -> TenantSessionBindingDataSourceConfig -> app.current_company_id`, and clarified that direct `set_config(...)` probes are not sufficient runtime evidence on their own.
Updated the compose-backed validation runtime guidance to match the init-managed defaults (`prod,flyway-v2,mock,validation-seed` plus `ERP_VALIDATION_SEED_ENABLED=true`).
Archived the round-1 failing scrutiny synthesis and the two prior failing review reports so the rerun artifacts can reference the original failure evidence without self-referential paths.
Recorded the round-2 pass synthesis for the milestone after both prior blocking findings were repaired and re-reviewed successfully.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require RLS packets to prove how live datasource sessions receive tenant context and reject synthetic `set_config(...)`-only proofs as insufficient for fail-closed completion.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round-1 scrutiny failed `accounting-tenant-isolation-rls-hardcut` because the migration depended on `app.current_company_id` while the runtime only stored tenant scope in `CompanyContextHolder`; the rerun only passed after a datasource wrapper and fail-closed helper were added.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that a feature's explicit verification contract can supersede the default `commands.gate-fast` recommendation and should not be recorded as a deviation when the narrower contract is followed exactly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `accounting-facade-layer-seams-hardcut` found the feature correctly followed its declared `test-characterization`, `compile`, and `targeted-accounting-proof` contract, but the worker still had to flag that as a skill deviation because the skill text treats `gate-fast` as the default final step.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tell workers to stop and return to orchestrator when a session is derailed by host-level Factory/BYOK configuration outside the repository instead of spending packet time editing `~/.factory` or other host settings.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The first attempt at `accounting-characterization-bedrock` spent its session fixing a BYOK/provider mapping in `~/.factory/settings.json`, and the feature description later had to add an explicit note that the host-level mismatch was outside packet scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the required handoff schema with what scrutiny expects by explicitly requiring structured safety-pattern, access-control proof, contract-artifact, and skill-feedback fields in final handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The passing review for `cross-module-accounting-tenant-fail-closed` found that the emitted handoff omitted the richer structured fields referenced by the worker skill, forcing scrutiny to reconstruct safety evidence from the transcript instead of the handoff itself.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a dedicated validation-seed probe command to `.factory/services.yaml`.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for now because the authoritative seed-fixture verification still lives inside `scripts/reset_final_validation_runtime.sh`; a safe additive command would duplicate that long SQL verifier until the logic is factored into a shared helper.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document the 30-day entry-date guard ordering ahead of locked-period rejection in shared-state docs.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected in this scrutiny packet because the fact is accurate but too flow-specific to place confidently without orchestrator direction on the right long-lived library surface.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add more shared-state guidance describing runtime seed-fixture dependencies for live curl proofs.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as already documented: `.factory/library/user-testing.md` already tells validators to treat runtime proof as not ready until the reset harness verifies seeded actors and fixture presence, including the validation super-admin scope.
